citation.description: Cross-repo criterion (navapbc/homebrew-rebar is not in this codebase). criteria.criterion: AUTOMATION — .github/workflows/autobump.yml added to navapbc/homebrew-rebar: scheduled (every 6h) + workflow_dispatch self-bump polling PyPI, updating Formula/rebar.rb url+sha256 with tap's own GITHUB_TOKEN, no stored cross-repo token; idempotent no-op when current; self-heals missed releases.
DOCS — docs/releasing.md step 3 rewritten to mark Homebrew automated (scheduled self-bump) with manual recipe kept as fallback.
RELEASE v0.9.1 — pyproject.toml and server.json bumped to 0.9.1 (lockstep).
RELEASE v0.9.1 — server.json top-level version and packages[].version both at 0.9.1.
CHANGELOG [0.9.1] covers this ticket (Homebrew automation) + ticket 858 (dedup filter).
